steps.title: Use the hardship clues
steps.content: After saying he has undergone a great deal, Trofimov lists hunger, illness, being shaken, and being tossed everywhere by fate. The word needs to mean lived through or suffered through difficult experiences.

steps.title: Reject wrong experiences
steps.content: Choice A means failed to care for something, but Trofimov is describing what happened to him. Choice B means took pleasure in, which contradicts the hardship. Choice C means communicated or transported, not experienced. The answer is D.
